prestazioni: Engine: 3.8L Twin-Turbo Flat-6 (M938) with a custom Motec M150 ECU reflash targeting 1,200 HP via upgraded Garrett GTX5533R turbos, billet compressor wheels, and 106mm titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, paired with a custom 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Akrapović featuring quad 3.5-inch outlets and electronically controlled valves for backpressure optimization

Drivetrain: Upgraded 7-speed PDK transmission with a Wavetrac limited-slip differential, reinforced internals by Hewland (FTR sequential upgrade), and a custom dual-plate carbon clutch by Tilton Engineering with a 3.5-inch diameter and 1,500 Nm torque capacity, paired with a Quaife ATB differential for launch control optimization

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound), custom valving for the Fenyr’s 1,650 kg weight, and a 30mm front / 25mm rear sway bar upgrade by H&R, paired with a full carbon fiber monocoque reinforcement by RML Group to reduce flex by 40%
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit for the Fenyr, including carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards, side skirts with air curtains, and a massive GT-style rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber flaps (30-60 degrees) and a 1,200 mm span, all tested in W Motors’ own wind tunnel for a 30% increase in downforce at 250 km/h

Exterior: Custom matte-finish vinyl wrap by 3M (2080-100 series) in ‘Liquid Copper’ with a satin clear coat, paired with forged aluminum BBS FI-R wheels (20x11 front, 21x13 rear) in a 5x150 PCD, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear) with custom ‘Fenyr SuperSport’ sidewall lettering

Interior: Full Alcantara and carbon fiber retrim by Sabelt, including custom bucket seats with 6-point harnesses (Sabelt 6SF), a carbon fiber steering wheel with integrated Motec C127 dash display, and a bespoke roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
